title: aetheolaena cuencana
intro: Aetheolaena cuencana, also known as Cunconana, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's extracts and preparations have been found to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against infections. Aetheolaena cuencana can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine in certain regions.
